MINI MINUTES:

Tara Mohseni, esq. (415-677-5617) of Severson & Werson for Defendant/opposing party Wells Fargo Bank NA.
No other appearances.

PLAINTIFF PATRICK TOBIN's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-547263 WITH CASE CGC-18-570468 is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
